nasb.text: Now prior to this, Eliashib the priest, who was appointed over the chambers of the house of our God, being related to Tobiah,

esv.text: Now before this, Eliashib the priest, who was appointed over the chambers of the house of our God, and who was related to Tobiah,

cnv.text: 這事以前，受委派管理我們　神殿的庫房的以利亞實祭司，與多比雅的關係很密切。

ccb.text: 这事之前，被委派负责上帝殿库房的以利亚实祭司因与多比雅是亲戚，
